name: @dnd-notes/control-plane
description: Control plane for multi-tenant orchestration and tenant registry

scripts.test:ci: c8 --all --src src --extension .ts --report-dir ../../reports/coverage/control-plane --reporter text-summary --reporter lcov --reporter json-summary --reporter cobertura node --import tsx --test --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=junit --test-reporter-destination=../../reports/test-results/control-plane.junit.xml test/*.test.ts
